differential_diagnoses: Penetrating duodenal ulcer with retroperitoneal abscess
Duodenal adenocarcinoma with local invasion and abscess
Foreign body perforation of the duodenum
Lemierre-like syndrome involving the inferior vena cava
next_steps: Echocardiogram (transthoracic and transesophageal) to rule out endocarditis
Urgent gastroenterology consultation for esophagogastroduodenoscopy (EGD) to evaluate duodenal pathology
Strongyloides serology and stool ova and parasite examination
Surgical consultation for potential drainage of retroperitoneal abscess
Serial blood cultures and monitoring of inflammatory markers
Hematology consultation to assess the clinical significance of the positive lupus anticoagulant in the setting of acute infection
